race_meta.race_name: Midnite Are Upping The Betting Game Classified Stakes (Div 1)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner saachi was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Gemini Man (IRE) with 48.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Gemini Man (IRE) > Virtual Hug (IRE), but actual result was Saachi > Gemini Man. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
